inputs.label: Mass
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of substance undergoing phase change

businessContext_i18n.en: Total mass of substance undergoing phase change
businessContext_i18n.tr: Faz değişimine uğrayan maddenin toplam kütlesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtmasse des Stoffes, der den Phasenwechsel durchläuft
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse totale de la substance subissant un changement de phase
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa total de la sustancia que experimenta cambio de fase
businessContext_i18n.ar: الكتلة الإجمالية للمادة الخاضعة لتغير الطور

inputs.label: Specific Heat Capacity
inputs.businessContext: Specific heat capacity of the substance (e.g., water: 4180 J/(kg·K))

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific heat capacity of the substance (e.g., water: 4180 J/(kg·K))
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maddenin özgül ısı kapasitesi (örneğin su: 4180 J/(kg·K))
businessContext_i18n.de: Spezifische Wärmekapazität des Stoffes (z. B. Wasser: 4180 J/(kg·K))
businessContext_i18n.fr: Capacité thermique massique de la substance (ex. eau : 4180 J/(kg·K))
businessContext_i18n.es: Capacidad calorífica específica de la sustancia (ej., agua: 4180 J/(kg·K))
businessContext_i18n.ar: السعة الحرارية النوعية للمادة (مثل الماء: 4180 جول/(كجم·كلفن))

inputs.label: Initial Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Starting temperature of the substance, must be ≤ melting point

businessContext_i18n.en: Starting temperature of the substance, must be ≤ melting point
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maddenin başlangıç sıcaklığı, erime noktasından ≤ olmalıdır
businessContext_i18n.de: Starttemperatur des Stoffes, muss ≤ Schmelzpunkt sein
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température initiale de la substance, doit être ≤ point de fusion
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura inicial de la sustancia, debe ser ≤ punto de fusión
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة الحرارة الابتدائية للمادة، يجب أن تكون ≤ درجة الانصهار

inputs.label: Melting Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Melting point of the substance (e.g., ice: 0°C)

businessContext_i18n.en: Melting point of the substance (e.g., ice: 0°C)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Point de fusion de la substance (ex. glace : 0°C)
businessContext_i18n.es: Punto de fusión de la sustancia (ej., hielo: 0°C)

inputs.label: Latent Heat of Fusion
inputs.businessContext: Energy per unit mass to change phase from solid to liquid (e.g., water: 334 kJ/kg)

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy per unit mass to change phase from solid to liquid (e.g., water: 334 kJ/kg)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Katıdan sıvıya faz değişimi için birim kütle başına enerji (örneğin su: 334 kJ/kg)
businessContext_i18n.de: Energie pro Masseneinheit für den Phasenwechsel von fest zu flüssig (z. B. Wasser: 334 kJ/kg)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Énergie par unité de masse pour passer de l'état solide à liquide (ex. eau : 334 kJ/kg)
businessContext_i18n.es: Energía por unidad de masa para cambiar de fase sólida a líquida (ej., agua: 334 kJ/kg)
businessContext_i18n.ar: الطاقة لكل وحدة كتلة لتغيير الطور من صلب إلى سائل (مثل الماء: 334 كيلوجول/كجم)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.

rules.message: Initial temperature must be ≤ melting temperature
